mapper.sql: id, follower_id, followee_id, relation_status, followed_at, canceled_at, relation_version, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_relation.relation_following SET relation_status = 'ACTIVE', followed_at = #{followedAt}, canceled_at = NULL, relation_version = #{relationVersion}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bluenote_relation.relation_following WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND relation_status = 'ACTIVE'
